notes: Response body not captured in this probe — the webapp consumes it and then calls ValidateIntermediaryToken. Response is expected to contain an `intermediaryToken` (JWT, `iss=textql`).
Invoked from https://app.textql.com/auth/oauth/google/callback after Google redirects back with ?code=...&state=...
Short-lived: the callback page fires this immediately, validates the returned JWT, then posts to ExchangeIntermediaryToken with an organizationId.
